text:
Created attachment 157159
shar with new port www/rubygem-cal-heatmap-rails-rails4

While working at the gitlab port, i figured out, that this port is needed. There is already a port www/rubygem-cal-heatmap-rails, which depends on rails3. But the project and all its dependencies depends at rails 4. Therefore this port is needed. Shar attached :)
